news.t: ETFs that 'gambled' on the recovery have beat the house
Overstock-heavy ETFs rally as online retailer surges, heads for its best daily showing since 2017

holdings.infoBox: PEZ is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tapestry stock at 4.03%, Cardinal Health at 3.96%, Ralph Lauren at 3.89%, Marriott International at 3.65%, and Williams-Sonoma at 3.58%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Consumer Cyclicals Momentum ETF (PEZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks an index of US consumer cyclical firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PEZ was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Dorsey Wright Consumer Cyclicals Tech Leaders TR
